title: Tao Te Ching 6
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 6 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 6 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The valley spirit never dies. It is called the mysterious female. The gate of the mysterious female is the root of heaven and earth.
